title: Negating signal greater than 64bits wide in a struct produces uncompilable code

features.name: struct containing signed signal wider than 64 bits
features.description: Code should include a struct containing a signed signal wider than 64 bits

features.name: negation of struct member signed wide signal
features.description: Code should include negation of a signed signal wider than 64 bits that resides inside a struct
features.snippet:
struct { logic signed[64:0] x; } s;
assign o_y = -s.x;

features.name: assignment to struct member with signed wide signal
features.description: Code should include assignment to a struct member that is a signed signal greater than 64 bits wide
features.snippet:
struct { logic signed[64:0] x; } s;
assign s.x = i_x;
